local_sources: Complete journal exports and sampling parameters
local_processing: Remove known local-path fields, known absolute path occurrences, and private QA text from the browser payload served through the loopback workbench, and require a per-session token for write operations

codex_context.purpose: Resolve column mappings, scope and sampling assumptions
codex_context.content: Headers, population summary, representative rows and user-approved parameters
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use headers, aggregates and representative rows instead of the full journal

codex_context.purpose: Explain the selected sample and notable strata
codex_context.content: Sampled rows, aggregate diagnostics and selection provenance
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Expose the selected sample and summaries, not non-selected journal rows

residual_risks.risk: Sampled journal descriptions can identify employees, suppliers or customers
residual_risks.mitigation: Keep the full journal local and expose only the reproducible sample and required diagnostic context

commercialista_notice.message_it: Il libro giornale completo viene elaborato localmente. Codex esamina le mappature, le statistiche aggregate e le sole righe selezionate nel campione.
commercialista_notice.message_en: The complete journal is processed locally. Codex reviews mappings, aggregate statistics and only the rows selected in the sample.

limitations: User-requested investigation can require additional targeted rows
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
